name: Precedence Pattern Followed By Add (right-of-?)
description: a ? { 1 -> 2 } + b — pattern's right side (the branches in braces) closes at '}'. After ?{...} returns, the outer top-level loop sees '+'. TERM=5 > NONE=0 attaches to the Pattern node. WILL_FAIL_UNTIL_FIX: semantically, '+ b' as infix on a pattern is malformed; this exists to document the precedence behavior.
